visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid border-border/50 for dividers. Avoid heavy card borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Replace soft drop shadows with 'Tactical Minimalism' - 1px solid strokes or selective inner glow shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(204,255,0,0.15)] for active states.
visual_enhancers.radii: rounded-2xl for main containers, rounded-full for avatars and primary buttons.

layouts.navigation: Fixed Bottom Navigation Bar using glassmorphism. Top header should be minimal.
layouts.feed: Cardless list layout with border-b dividers, gap-4.
layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Bento Grid (gap-4). Full width for hero rooms, half width for smaller blocks.
layouts.stories: Horizontal scrolling row at the top. Avatar circles with 2px solid primary border and 2px offset (ring-offset-background).

components.voice_room_card: Dark surface card. Avatar stack for listeners. Active speaker indicator: Lime green pulse ring.
components.thread_post: RTL aligned: Avatar on the right, content on the left. Minimalist action icons (Like, Retweet, Reply) at the bottom.
components.avatar: Circular images. If active story or speaking, wrap in border-primary.
components.bottom_nav: 5 evenly spaced icons (Home, Rooms, Add Post, Messages, Profile). Active icon gets primary color.
components.messages_list: List item with avatar (right), name and last message snippet. Unread indicator: Lime green dot (w-3 h-3 rounded-full).
components.notifications: Icon/Avatar (right), notification text (left). Highlight new notifications with a subtle surface background tint.

motion.active_speaker: animate-pulse with glowing drop-shadow for active voice participants.
motion.interactions: Hover and active states must trigger subtle scale (active:scale-95) and background tint changes.
motion.page_transitions: Slide in from left/right depending on navigation direction (if using framer-motion).

accessibility.contrast: Black text on Lime Green primary elements guarantees WCAG AAA. White text on dark surfaces.
accessibility.rtl_alignment: Text must align right. Use flex-row-reverse or dir='rtl' wrapper. Ensure icons point the correct way (e.g., back arrow points right).
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid in kebab-case.

media.strategy: High contrast, energetic sports imagery. Dark overlays on cover photos to ensure text readability.

images.description: Aerial view of a night football match in Budapest. Illuminated stadium.
Joyous man celebrating a football victory with fans in a stadium.
Fans cheer as players take the field at a vibrant football stadium.
a soccer stadium filled with lots of people

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building an RTL (Arabic) mobile-first web app named 'صوت الكورة'.
Ensure HTML document has `<html dir='rtl' lang='ar'>`.
Include Google Fonts import in index.css for Cairo and Almarai.
Apply Cairo to headings and Almarai to body paragraphs.
Adopt the 'THE PERFORMANCE PRO' archetype: dark obsidian background (#0A0A0A), stark contrast, and 'Tactical Minimalism'.
The primary brand color is Lime Green (#CCFF00). Use it for primary CTAs, active states, and highlighting key data. Do not overuse it; let it act as an electric highlight.
For the Feed (ThreadsPage), do not use heavy boxed cards. Use a 'cardless' approach with structural 1px bottom borders separating posts.
For the Voice Rooms, create a vibrant interface. Active speakers need a glowing Neon/Lime Green border.
Include a global mobile Bottom Navigation bar with glassmorphism (bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-xl). It should look premium.
Implement Shadcn/UI components but heavily customize their styling (e.g., remove default Vercel look, make them darker and sharper).
Ensure flex layouts respect RTL (e.g., Avatars on the right, text to their left).
Never use transparent backgrounds without a blur on overlays/headers.
All components should be fully responsive but prioritize the mobile layout view (max-w-md mx-auto for desktop container to simulate mobile app if needed, or proper responsive scaling).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
